---
id: create-action-requests-for-lw-m-2-m-devices
title: "Create Action Requests for LwM2M Devices."
description: "Initiate LwM2M actions like read, write, execute on the specified devices. The devices have to be connected to 1NCE LwM2M endpoint to invoke this event."
sidebar_label: "Create Action Requests for LwM2M Devices."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/1nce-os/1-nce-os
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create Action Requests for LwM2M Devices."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/integrate/devices/actions/LWM2M"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Initiate LwM2M actions like read, write, execute on the specified devices. The devices have to be connected to 1NCE LwM2M endpoint to invoke this event.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
